sentences: The poster had a zanyish cartoon style. 那張海報帶著有點滑稽的卡通風格。

meaning: 滑稽可笑的舉止或作風
sentences: The comedian's zanyism kept the crowd entertained. 那位喜劇演員的滑稽作風讓觀眾一直很開心。
She disliked his constant zanyism in class. 她不喜歡他在課堂上老是做出滑稽舉動。

meaning: 小丑的身分；滑稽行為的狀態
sentences: His zanyship made him the life of the party. 他那種小丑式的舉止讓他成了派對的靈魂人物。
The novel treats zanyship as a kind of performance. 那本小說把滑稽行為當成一種表演。

meaning: 與桑吉巴爾有關的；桑吉巴爾人的
sentences: The exhibit included Zanzalian jewelry and cloth. 展覽裡有與桑吉巴爾有關的珠寶和布料。
A Zanzalian family spoke warmly about their island home. 一個桑吉巴爾家庭熱情談起他們的島嶼家園。

meaning: 贊澤；一個罕見的專名
sentences: The old ledger listed a place called Zanze. 舊帳簿上列出了一個叫贊澤的地方。
No one knew whether zanze referred to a person or a town. 沒有人知道這個名稱是指人還是城鎮。

meaning: 桑給巴爾人；與桑給巴爾有關的
sentences: A Zanzibari musician played the drum at sunset. 一位桑給巴爾音樂家在日落時打鼓。
The article described Zanzibari cuisine and trade. 文章介紹了桑給巴爾的飲食與貿易。

meaning: 薩帕拉人；一個民族名稱
sentences: The Zapara welcomed the visitors with songs. 薩帕拉族人以歌聲歡迎來客。
Anthropologists studied the Zapara way of life. 人類學家研究薩帕拉族的生活方式。

meaning: 薩帕拉的；與薩帕拉族有關的人或事物
sentences: The journal recorded a Zaparan village festival. 期刊記錄了一場薩帕拉族村莊節慶。
She listened to a Zaparan story told by an elder. 她聽一位長者講述薩帕拉族的故事。

meaning: 薩帕羅人；一個民族名稱
sentences: The museum had a display about the Zaparo. 博物館有一個關於薩帕羅族的展區。
A Zaparo guide explained the forest plants. 一位薩帕羅嚮導解釋了森林植物。

meaning: 薩帕羅的；與薩帕羅族有關的
sentences: The Zaparoan canoe was carved from a single log. 那艘薩帕羅族的獨木舟是從整段木頭雕成的。
Researchers noted Zaparoan songs in the archive. 研究人員在檔案裡記錄了薩帕羅族的歌曲。

meaning: 扎帕斯；一個罕見的名稱
sentences: The clerk copied the name zapas from the list. 這位職員從名單上抄下了扎帕斯這個名字。
Zapas appeared once in the old travel notes. 扎帕斯只在那份舊旅遊筆記裡出現過一次。

meaning: 鞋匠；製鞋或修鞋的人
sentences: The zapatero repaired my worn-out boots. 那位鞋匠修好了我磨破的靴子。
In the village, the zapatero worked beside the market. 在村子裡，鞋匠就在市場旁工作。

meaning: 札法拉；一個罕見的專名
sentences: The manuscript mentioned a place named zaphara. 那份手稿提到一個名為札法拉的地方。
She wrote zaphara in the margin as a possible variant. 她在頁邊寫下札法拉，作為可能的異拼。

meaning: 與薩非提克人或其語言有關的
sentences: The scholar examined a Zaphetic inscription. 那位學者研究了一段與薩非提克相關的銘文。
A Zaphetic group was described in the old survey. 舊調查報告裡描述了一個薩非提克族群。

meaning: 錐珊瑚類；一種化石珊瑚的成員
sentences: The rock contained a zaphrentid fossil. 那塊岩石裡含有一枚錐珊瑚類化石。
Students used a hand lens to study the zaphrentid. 學生們用放大鏡觀察那枚錐珊瑚化石。

meaning: 錐珊瑚科；一種化石珊瑚的科名
sentences: The fossil was labeled Zaphrentidae in the drawer. 那枚化石在抽屜裡標為錐珊瑚科。
Paleontologists sorted the specimen into Zaphrentidae. 古生物學家把那件標本歸入錐珊瑚科。

meaning: 錐珊瑚屬；一種化石珊瑚的屬名
sentences: The plate showed a Zaphrentis shell-like form. 那張圖版展示了錐珊瑚屬的殼狀外形。
Researchers kept the Zaphrentis specimen in a small box. 研究人員把錐珊瑚屬標本放在一個小盒子裡。

meaning: 像錐珊瑚的；錐珊瑚狀的
sentences: The zaphrentoid shape was visible in the fossil. 那塊化石上看得出錐珊瑚狀外形。
He drew a zaphrentoid curve in the notebook. 他在筆記本裡畫了一條錐珊瑚狀的曲線。

meaning: 跳鼠科；一類小型嚙齒動物的科名
sentences: The specimen was cataloged under Zapodidae. 這件標本被編入跳鼠科。
Scientists compared Zapodidae with other jumping rodents. 科學家把跳鼠科和其他跳躍型嚙齒動物作比較。

meaning: 跳鼠亞科；一類小型嚙齒動物的亞科名
sentences: The textbook placed the animal in Zapodinae. 教科書把那種動物列入跳鼠亞科。
A zoologist explained that Zapodinae includes jumping mice. 一位動物學家解釋，跳鼠亞科包含會跳的小鼠。

meaning: 扎波羅熱哥薩克的；與扎波羅熱哥薩克有關的人
sentences: The painting showed a Zaporogian camp by the river. 那幅畫描繪了河邊的扎波羅熱哥薩克營地。
He read a Zaporogian tale about frontier warriors. 他讀了一則關於邊疆戰士的扎波羅熱哥薩克故事。

meaning: 扎波羅熱哥薩克人；一個歷史稱呼
sentences: The Zaporogue riders crossed the steppe at dawn. 扎波羅熱哥薩克騎士在黎明穿越草原。
A Zaporogue captain appeared in the old legend. 舊傳說裡出現了一位扎波羅熱哥薩克隊長。

meaning: a sapote tree or its fruit
sentences: The zapota tree bore sweet fruit. 這棵西番果樹結出甜果。
They cut a zapota open for dessert. 他們把一顆西番果切開當甜點。

meaning: an indigenous people of Oaxaca and their language
sentences: The museum displayed a Zapotec weaving. 博物館展出了一件薩波特克織品。
A Zapotec speaker told the story in class. 一位薩波特克語使用者在課堂上講了那個故事。

meaning: of or relating to the Zapotec people or language
sentences: The paper described Zapotecan pottery styles. 那篇文章介紹了薩波特克式陶器風格。
They studied Zapotecan words in a language class. 他們在語言課上研究薩波特克語詞彙。

meaning: a Zapotec person or a Zapotec language variety
sentences: An old Zapoteco tale was read aloud. 一則古老的薩波特克故事被朗讀出來。
The guide spoke with a Zapoteco elder. 導覽員與一位薩波特克長者交談。

meaning: an Ottoman rural police officer
sentences: The zaptiah guarded the village road. 那名奧斯曼鄉村警察守著村道。
A zaptiah rode past the market at noon. 中午時，一名鄉村警察騎馬經過市集。

meaning: an Ottoman rural police officer
sentences: The zaptieh checked the travelers at the gate. 那名奧斯曼鄉村警察在城門口盤查旅人。
A zaptieh kept watch through the night. 一名鄉村警察整夜守望。

meaning: a member of the Zapotec people
sentences: The Zaptoeca elders met with the council. 薩波特克長者與議會會面。
A Zaptoeca singer performed at the festival. 一位薩波特克歌手在節慶上演出。

meaning: a tropical agave or fiber plant
sentences: The zapupe plant grows in dry ground. 這種龍舌蘭植物生長在乾地上。
Workers harvested zapupe for its strong fiber. 工人採收這種植物，取它堅韌的纖維。

meaning: a genus of jumping mice
sentences: The biologist noted a rare Zapus species. 生物學家記錄到一種罕見的跳鼠屬動物。
A Zapus leaped across the grass. 一隻跳鼠從草地上跳了過去。

meaning: the tree of hell in Islamic tradition
sentences: The poem mentioned zaqqum as a dreadful tree. 那首詩把它說成可怕的地獄樹。
Stories of zaqqum appear in religious writing. 宗教著作裡常提到這棵地獄樹。

meaning: a title of a Muisca ruler
sentences: The Zaque ruled one part of the highlands. 那位扎克首領統治高原的一部分地區。
History books still mention the Zaque title. 歷史書仍然提到這個首領稱號。

meaning: a variant spelling of tsar
sentences: The old text used zar for an emperor. 舊文獻用它來指稱皇帝。
He replaced the zar spelling with a modern form. 他把這個拼法改成較現代的寫法。

meaning: a slow Spanish dance or its music
sentences: The zarabanda moved slowly across the floor. 薩拉班德舞緩慢地在舞池中移動。
The violin played a soft zarabanda. 小提琴奏出一段柔和的薩拉班德舞曲。

meaning: a member of a Tanzanian people or their language
sentences: A Zaramo family lived near the coast. 一戶薩拉莫族家庭住在海邊。
The teacher asked about Zaramo customs. 老師問起薩拉莫族的習俗。

meaning: of or relating to Zoroaster or his religion
sentences: The book discussed Zarathustrian beliefs. 那本書討論了瑣羅亞斯德教的信仰。
They studied a Zarathustrian text in class. 他們在課堂上研讀一篇祆教文獻。

meaning: the religion of Zoroaster
sentences: Zarathustrianism shaped the old kingdom. 瑣羅亞斯德教影響了那個古王國。
She wrote a paper on Zarathustrianism. 她寫了一篇關於祆教的報告。

meaning: the religion of Zoroaster
sentences: The essay used Zarathustrism as the older term. 那篇文章把它當作較古老的說法。
Historians compared Zarathustrism with later forms. 歷史學家把這種古老宗教與後來的形式作比較。

meaning: a nickel carbonate mineral
sentences: The specimen was labeled as zaratite. 那塊標本被標為薩拉替礦。
Green zaratite appeared in the rock sample. 岩石樣本裡出現了綠色的鎳碳酸鹽礦物。

meaning: a follower of Zoroaster; Zoroastrian
sentences: A Zardushti priest led the ceremony. 一位祆教祭司主持了儀式。
The family kept its Zardushti traditions. 這個家庭保留著祆教傳統。

meaning: an enclosure made with thorn bushes or stakes
sentences: The camp stood inside a zareba of thorns. 營地被一圈荊棘圍欄包住。
They built a zareba to keep out animals. 他們築起荊棘圍欄來防止動物闖入。

meaning: a female given name
sentences: Zarema signed the guest book first. 扎蕾瑪先在來賓簿上簽名。
The teacher called on Zarema to answer. 老師點名讓扎蕾瑪回答。

meaning: an ornamental cup holder, especially for coffee
sentences: The cup sat inside a silver zarf. 那只杯子放在銀製杯套架裡。
He polished the zarf before serving coffee. 他在端咖啡前先把杯套架擦亮。

meaning: a yellow arsenic sulfide mineral
sentences: The miner identified the yellow stone as zarnich. 礦工把那塊黃色石頭認作砷硫礦。
A label on the tray read zarnich. 樣本盤上的標籤寫著這種礦物名。

meaning: a sudden jerk or rough clutch
sentences: He gave the rope a hard zarp. 他猛地拽了一下繩子。
The cat made a quick zarp at the toy. 貓快速抓了一下玩具。

meaning: a Spanish musical drama with songs and spoken parts
sentences: We watched a zarzuela at the theater. 我們在劇院看了一齣薩蘇埃拉歌劇。
The zarzuela mixed dialogue with lively songs. 這齣薩蘇埃拉歌劇把對白和熱鬧歌曲混在一起。

meaning: a tiny amount; a bit
sentences: There was not a zat of sugar left. 糖一點也不剩。
He added a zat of salt and tasted it. 他加了一點鹽，然後嘗了嘗。

meaning: inherent; intrinsic
sentences: The zati quality of the stone made it valuable. 這塊石頭的固有特質讓它很珍貴。
He treated the color as a zati feature of the flower. 他把這種顏色看成花朵本身的固有特徵。

meaning: an insignificant matter or trifle
sentences: He dismissed the mistake as a zattare. 他把那個錯誤當成小事。
The quarrel was really only a zattare. 那場爭執其實只是芝麻小事。

meaning: a star in the constellation Eridanus
sentences: Zaurak shines faintly in the winter sky. 扎烏拉克在冬夜天空中微微發光。
The chart marked Zaurak near Eridanus. 星圖把扎烏拉克標在波江座附近。

meaning: a genus of flowering plants, also called California fuchsia
sentences: The garden path was lined with Zauschneria. 花園小徑旁種滿了這種植物。
A bright Zauschneria bloomed by the wall. 牆邊開出一叢鮮紅的加州倒掛金鐘。

meaning: a star in the constellation Virgo
sentences: Zavijava is visible on a clear night. 天氣晴朗時可以看見扎維賈瓦星。
The astronomer pointed to Zavijava on the map. 天文學家在星圖上指出扎維賈瓦星。

meaning: a mason's tool for trimming slates or bricks
sentences: The mason sharpened his zax before work. 砌石工人在開工前磨利他的工具。
A zax lies beside the block of slate. 一把砌石工具放在石板旁邊。

meaning: a Burmese rest house or monastery
sentences: The travelers slept in a zayat overnight. 旅人們在緬甸的休息屋過了一夜。
A zayat stood near the village road. 村道旁有一座休息屋。

meaning: the seventh letter of the Hebrew alphabet
sentences: Zayin comes after vav in Hebrew. 在希伯來字母中，它排在前一個字母之後。
The lesson began with the letter zayin. 這堂課從第七個希伯來字母開始。

meaning: a genus of grasses that includes maize
sentences: Maize belongs to the genus Zea. 玉米屬於禾本科的這一屬。
Botanists studied a Zea specimen in the lab. 植物學家在實驗室裡研究了一株禾本科標本。

meaning: 對人、事業或理想的熱情或不知疲倦的奉獻以及促進其發展的決心；勤奮熱情；強烈的興趣。
sentences: She extols the virtues of veganism with missionary zeal. 她以傳道者的熱情頌揚素食主義的美德。

The term zeal refers to the fervour or tireless devotion for a person, cause, or ideal and determination in its furtherance; diligent enthusiasm; powerful interest. 熱情一詞是指對一個人、一個事業或一個理想的熱情或不知疲倦的奉獻以及促進其發展的決心；勤奮熱情；強大的興趣。

meaning: a person from Zealand or New Zealand
sentences: A Zealander greeted the visitors at the dock. 一位紐西蘭人/澤蘭人，在碼頭迎接來客。
The Zealander spoke with a calm accent. 那位澤蘭人說話帶著平和的口音。

meaning: full of zeal; eager
sentences: She gave a zealful speech to the class. 她對全班發表了一段充滿熱忱的演說。
His zealful work impressed the teacher. 他熱忱的工作給老師留下深刻印象。

meaning: lacking zeal; without enthusiasm
sentences: He sounded zealless during the meeting. 他在會議中聽起來毫無熱情。
The crowd gave a zealless response. 群眾的回應冷冷淡淡。

meaning: the state of lacking zeal
sentences: Her zeallessness worried the coach. 她缺乏熱情的狀態讓教練擔心。
The report noted a zeallessness in the team. 報告指出團隊顯得沒有幹勁。

meaning: a fanatical or uncompromising enthusiast
sentences: The zealot refused every compromise. 那名狂熱者拒絕任何妥協。
He sounded like a zealot in the debate. 他在辯論中聽起來像個狂熱分子。

meaning: fanatical; given to zealotry
sentences: The zealotic tone made the audience uneasy. 那種狂熱的語氣讓聽眾不安。
His zealotic comments ended the discussion. 他狂熱的評論結束了討論。

meaning: fanatical; excessively zealous
sentences: The zealotical speech went on for hours. 那場狂熱的演說持續了好幾個小時。
She disliked his zealotical manner. 她不喜歡他那種偏執狂熱的態度。

meaning: fanatical zeal or the doctrine of zealots
sentences: The essay criticized zealotism in politics. 那篇文章批評政治中的狂熱主義。
Zealotism can turn a debate into a fight. 狂熱主義會把辯論變成爭鬥。

meaning: a zealot; a fanatic
sentences: The zealotist spoke with sharp certainty. 那名狂熱分子說話斬釘截鐵。
No one wanted to argue with the zealotist. 沒有人想和那位狂熱者爭論。

meaning: fanatical enthusiasm or intolerance
sentences: Zealotry often leaves no room for doubt. 狂熱常常不給懷疑留下空間。
The crowd fell into zealotry very quickly. 群眾很快就陷入狂熱。

meaning: 熱心的，狂熱的
sentences: He is a zealous supporter of environmental protection and recycling. 他是環境保護與回收利用的熱心支持者。
She is very zealous in her efforts to help the homeless in the city. 她非常熱心地致力於幫助城市裡的無家可歸者。

meaning: in a zealous manner; eagerly
sentences: She zealously checked every detail. 她熱心而仔細地檢查每一個細節。
They zealously defended their plan. 他們滿腔熱忱地捍衛自己的計畫。

meaning: the quality of being zealous
sentences: His zealousness was clear in the project. 他在這項計畫中的熱忱非常明顯。
The teacher praised her zealousness. 老師稱讚她的熱情投入。

meaning: zeal; eager ardor
sentences: The writer showed zealousy for the cause. 那位作家對這個理想表現出熱切的投入。
Old books sometimes use zealousy for zeal. 舊書有時用這個詞表示熱忱。

meaning: resistant to zeal; not easily excited
sentences: He seemed zealproof during the speech. 他在演說中看起來毫無被激起熱情的樣子。
The crowd was almost zealproof that day. 那天群眾幾乎怎麼煽動都沒反應。

meaning: 斑馬
sentences: The zebra is a wild animal famous for its black and white stripes. 斑馬是以其黑白條紋聞名的野生動物。
We saw a large herd of zebras grazing in the African savannah. 我們在非洲大草原上看到一大群斑馬正在吃草。

meaning: striped like a zebra
sentences: The jacket had a zebraic pattern. 那件外套有斑馬般的條紋花樣。
A zebraic bird flashed by the window. 一隻有條紋感的鳥從窗邊掠過。

meaning: 像斑馬的；帶有斑馬條紋的
sentences: The fabric had a zebralike pattern of black and white stripes. 那塊布有像斑馬一樣的黑白條紋。
Her zebralike coat stood out in the crowd. 她那件帶斑馬條紋的外套在人群中特別醒目。

meaning: 斑驢；斑馬與驢的雜交動物
sentences: The zebrass was kept in a special enclosure at the farm. 那頭斑驢被養在農場的特別圍欄裡。
A zebrass has traits from both a zebra and an ass. 斑驢同時帶有斑馬和驢子的特徵。

meaning: 斑馬木；有條紋的熱帶硬木
sentences: The desk was made of zebrawood with a bold striped grain. 那張桌子用斑馬木製成，木紋非常鮮明。
Craftsmen value zebrawood for its strong, decorative look. 工匠喜歡斑馬木，因為它堅硬又有裝飾效果。

meaning: 紫鴨跖草屬；一類觀賞植物
sentences: The windowsill held a small Zebrina in a clay pot. 窗台上擺著一盆小小的紫鴨跖草屬植物。
Gardeners grow Zebrina for its trailing stems and colored leaves. 園丁栽種紫鴨跖草屬植物，是因為它的蔓生莖與彩葉。

meaning: 像斑馬的；斑馬般的
sentences: The horse had a faint zebrine striping on its legs. 那匹馬腿上有淡淡的斑馬式條紋。
A zebrine pattern can make an animal look unusual. 斑馬般的花紋會讓動物看起來很特別。

meaning: 像斑馬的；帶斑馬條紋的
sentences: The artist painted a zebrinny horse on the wall. 那位畫家在牆上畫了一匹斑馬條紋的馬。
Her zebrinny scarf had narrow black stripes. 她那條像斑馬的圍巾上有細細的黑條紋。

meaning: 斑馬雜交種；外形像斑馬的雜交動物
sentences: The zoologist described the animal as a zebroid. 那位動物學家把那隻動物描述為斑馬雜交種。
A zebroid often shows stripes on a horse-like body. 斑馬雜交種常在像馬的身體上出現條紋。

meaning: 斑馬雜交獸；一種斑馬雜交動物
sentences: The breeder showed a zebrula at the exhibition. 那位飼育者在展覽上展示了一隻斑馬雜交獸。
A zebrula is known for its striped coat and mixed features. 斑馬雜交獸以條紋毛色和混合特徵聞名。

meaning: 斑馬雜交獸；另一種斑馬雜交動物
sentences: The old book mentioned a zebrule among unusual animal crosses. 那本舊書在奇特的動物雜交種裡提到了斑馬雜交獸。
A zebrule may resemble both a zebra and a horse. 斑馬雜交獸可能同時像斑馬也像馬。

meaning: 瘤牛；背上有隆起的牛
sentences: The zebu stood quietly in the warm field. 那頭瘤牛安靜地站在溫暖的田裡。
A zebu has a hump on its shoulders. 瘤牛的肩上有一個隆起的瘤。

meaning: 蒼蠅；舊式寫法中也可指魔王別名
sentences: The old text used zebub in the sense of a fly. 那份古老文字裡，這個詞是指蒼蠅。
He recognized the word zebub from an archaic religious passage. 他從一段古老的宗教文字裡認出了這個詞。

meaning: 西布倫支派的人；西布倫後裔
sentences: The chronicle named him as a Zebulunite. 那部編年史把他記作西布倫支派的人。
A Zebulunite was said to have served in the tribe. 據說有一位西布倫後裔曾在該支派中服役。

meaning: 斑驢；斑馬與驢的雜交動物
sentences: The zebu-like animal in the story was actually a zeburro. 那個故事裡那隻像牛的動物其實是斑驢。
A zeburro usually has a striped coat and long ears. 斑驢通常有條紋毛色和長耳朵。

meaning: 威尼斯金幣；zecchino 的複數
sentences: The chest contained several old zecchini. 那只箱子裡有幾枚古老的威尼斯金幣。
Collectors pay a lot for rare zecchini. 收藏家願意為稀有的威尼斯金幣付出高價。

meaning: 威尼斯金幣
sentences: The museum displayed a bright zecchino from Venice. 博物館展出了一枚來自威尼斯的金幣。
A zecchino was once a respected gold coin in Italy. 這種金幣曾是義大利受人重視的貨幣。

meaning: 威尼斯金幣；zecchino 的另一拼法
sentences: The ledger listed a zechin among the treasures. 帳冊裡把一枚威尼斯金幣列在珍寶之中。
He found the word zechin in an old trade record. 他在一份古老的貿易紀錄裡找到這個詞。

meaning: 上二疊紀的岩層；歐洲北部的海相地層
sentences: The geologist studied the Zechstein beds in the quarry. 那位地質學家在採石場研究澤赫斯泰因岩層。
Zechstein refers to a late Permian rock series in Europe. 澤赫斯泰因指的是歐洲晚二疊紀的一套岩層。

meaning: 字母 Z；英式讀法中的 Z
sentences: In Britain, the letter z is called zed. 在英國，這個字母讀作澤德。
She wrote a large zed at the end of the line. 她在那一行的最後寫了一個大寫的字母。

meaning: 薑黃屬芳香根莖；莪朮
sentences: The herbal tea smelled faintly of zedoary. 那杯草本茶帶著淡淡的莪朮香氣。
Zedoary is an aromatic rhizome related to ginger. 莪朮是一種和薑類相近的芳香根莖。

meaning: 字母 Z；美式讀法中的 Z
sentences: In the United States, z is called zee. 在美國，這個字母讀作西。
The teacher asked the child to say zee clearly. 老師要孩子把這個字母清楚地念出來。

meaning: 字母 Z 的另一種說法；作為名稱或記號的 Z
sentences: The speaker used zeed when spelling the final letter. 那位發言者在拼讀最後一個字母時用了這個說法。
He heard zeed in an old phonetic note. 他在一則舊的發音筆記裡聽到這個說法。

meaning: 澤蘭人；荷蘭澤蘭省居民
sentences: A Zeelander explained the history of the harbor town. 一位澤蘭人解釋了那座港口城鎮的歷史。
The guide met a Zeelander at the local museum. 導遊在當地博物館遇到了一位澤蘭人。

meaning: 齊古哈；罕見的人名或地名
sentences: The map marked Zeguha as a small settlement. 地圖上把齊古哈標成一個小聚落。
Zeguha appeared only once in the old record. 齊古哈只在那份舊紀錄裡出現過一次。

meaning: 德語中的十元硬幣；十件之一
sentences: He paid with a zehner at the market stall. 他在市場攤位上用一枚十元硬幣付款。
The word zehner literally means a ten-piece or ten-coin. 這個詞字面上就是十件或十元硬幣的意思。

meaning: 多瑞魚科；一科海魚
sentences: The specimen was identified as belonging to Zeidae. 那件標本被辨認為屬於多瑞魚科。
Zeidae includes the dories and their relatives. 多瑞魚科包含多瑞魚及其近親。

meaning: 玉米醇溶蛋白；玉米中的蛋白質
sentences: The chemist isolated zein from corn kernels. 化學家從玉米粒中分離出玉米醇溶蛋白。
Zein is a protein found in maize. 這是一種存在於玉米中的蛋白質。

meaning: 宙斯崇拜；對宙斯的信仰
sentences: The essay discussed zeism in ancient Greece. 那篇文章討論了古希臘的宙斯崇拜。
Zeism focuses on worship of Zeus. 這個詞指的是對宙斯的崇拜。

meaning: 澤伊斯特人；荷蘭地名澤伊斯特的居民
sentences: The guide introduced a zeist who lived near the canal. 導遊介紹了一位住在運河附近的澤伊斯特人。
A zeist was asked about the old town square. 那位澤伊斯特人被問到舊城廣場的事。

meaning: 齊克；以西結的暱稱
sentences: Zeke arrived early and opened the gate. 齊克提早到了，並把大門打開。
Everyone called Ezekiel by the nickname Zeke. 大家都用齊克這個暱稱稱呼以西結。

meaning: 熱心；熱忱
sentences: He spoke with zel about the new project. 他帶著熱忱談論這個新計畫。
Her zel for the cause impressed the committee. 她對這件事的熱心讓委員會印象深刻。

meaning: 澤蘭的；與澤蘭有關的
sentences: The article described a Zelanian merchant ship. 那篇文章描述了一艘澤蘭商船。
Its Zelanian origin was noted in the archive. 檔案裡記下了它的澤蘭出處。

meaning: 熱心支持者；熱忱的倡導者
sentences: The zelator defended the proposal in public. 那位熱心支持者在公開場合為提案辯護。
A zelator often acts with strong conviction. 熱忱的倡導者通常帶著強烈信念行事。

meaning: 女熱心支持者；女性倡導者
sentences: The zelatrice led the discussion with confidence. 那位女熱心支持者很有自信地主持討論。
A zelatrice is a female form of zelator. 這是男稱詞的女性形式。

meaning: 女熱心支持者；女性倡導者
sentences: The old text referred to her as a zelatrix. 那份舊文把她稱作女熱心支持者。
A zelatrix is a woman known for zealous support. 這個詞指的是一位以熱忱支持聞名的女性。

meaning: 榉屬；一種樹木屬
sentences: The park path was lined with Zelkova trees. 公園小徑兩旁種著榉屬樹木。
Zelkova is valued for its graceful form and hard wood. 榉屬樹以姿態優美和木材堅硬而受重視。

meaning: 澤爾丁格的；來自德國澤爾廷根地區的
sentences: The bottle carried a Zeltinger wine label. 那個瓶子上貼著澤爾丁格葡萄酒標籤。
A Zeltinger Riesling is named for the German village. 澤爾丁格雷司令酒是以德國那個村莊命名的。

meaning: 地神崇拜；對大地的宗教崇敬
sentences: The lecture connected zemeism with ancient fertility rites. 那場演講把地神崇拜和古代生育儀式連在一起。
Zemeism treats the earth as a sacred power. 這種信仰把大地視為神聖的力量。

meaning: 西印度群島的神像；靈物
sentences: The archaeologist found a carved zemi in the cave. 考古學家在洞穴裡找到一尊雕刻的靈像。
A zemi was revered as a protective spirit. 這種靈物被視為守護靈而受到崇敬。

meaning: 佃地制度；土邦地租領地
sentences: The report described the decline of zemimdari in the region. 報告描述了該地區佃地制度的衰落。
Zemimdari refers to the land system of a zemindar. 這個詞指的是地主的土地制度。

meaning: 地主；印度舊時的稅收承包者
sentences: The zemindar collected rent from the village. 那位地主向村莊收租。
A zemindar once held local revenue rights. 這類地主曾握有地方稅收權。

meaning: 受保護的非穆斯林；舊時奧斯曼帝國的臣民
sentences: The historical essay used zemmi for a protected non-Muslim subject. 那篇歷史文章用這個詞指受保護的非穆斯林臣民。
A zemmi lived under special legal protection. 這類人受到特殊的法律保護。

meaning: 地鼠；一種會掘洞的嚙齒動物
sentences: The farmer saw a zemni near the burrow. 那位農夫在洞口附近看到一隻地鼠。
A zemni spends much of its life underground. 地鼠有很大一部分時間都在地底生活。

meaning: 地方自治支持者；zemstvo 制度的擁護者
sentences: The zemstroist campaigned for local self-government. 那位地方自治支持者為地方自治奔走。
A zemstroist supported the zemstvo reform movement. 這類人支持地方自治改革運動。

meaning: 澤姆斯特沃；俄國舊時的地方自治機構
sentences: The zemstvo met to discuss roads and schools. 那個地方自治機構開會討論道路和學校。
A zemstvo was an elected local council in imperial Russia. 這是俄羅斯帝國時期的選舉地方議會。

meaning: 禪；禪宗
sentences: She studied Zen to calm her mind. 她學習禪宗來讓心靜下來。
Zen emphasizes meditation and direct insight. 禪宗重視冥想與直接的體悟。

meaning: 塞納加語；一種柏柏爾語
sentences: The linguist recorded a sentence in Zenaga. 那位語言學家錄下一句塞納加語。
Zenaga is a Berber language spoken in parts of North Africa. 塞納加語是北非部分地區使用的柏柏爾語。

meaning: 澤奈達；一種鴿屬，也可作女子名
sentences: The birdwatcher identified the dove as a Zenaida. 那位賞鳥者把那隻鴿子辨認為澤奈達屬。
Zenaida is also used as a feminine given name. 這個名字也可作為女性名字。

meaning: 澤奈達亞科；一群鴿類
sentences: The species was classified under Zenaidinae. 這個物種被歸入澤奈達亞科。
Zenaidinae includes several doves of the New World. 澤奈達亞科包含幾種新世界鴿類。

meaning: 澤奈杜拉屬；一種鴿類屬
sentences: Zenaidura was listed in the ornithology text. 那本鳥類學書裡列出了澤奈杜拉屬。
A bird in the genus Zenaidura is a kind of dove. 澤奈杜拉屬的鳥是一種鴿子。

meaning: 內室；南亞家庭中婦女居住的房間
sentences: The women gathered in the zenana after dinner. 晚餐後，婦女們聚在內室裡。
A zenana is the women's quarters in a South Asian house. 這是南亞住宅中的婦女居室。

meaning: 桑德語；古波斯語註解傳統中的語言
sentences: The scholar studied Zend for its religious texts. 那位學者為了宗教典籍而研究桑德語。
A short lesson in Zend opened the language class. 語言課先從一段桑德語簡介開始。

meaning: 與桑德語或其古波斯傳統有關的
sentences: The museum displayed a Zendic manuscript. 博物館展出了一份與桑德語有關的手稿。
Her notes included a Zendic glossary. 她的筆記裡附上了一份桑德語詞彙表。

meaning: 桑德語研究者；桑德語使用者
sentences: The zendician translated the old prayer carefully. 那位桑德語研究者小心地翻譯那段古老祈禱文。
A zendician can explain the text's rare terms. 桑德語研究者能解釋文中罕見的詞彙。

meaning: 異端者；不守正統信仰的人
sentences: The sermon warned against the zendik. 那篇講道警告人們不要追隨異端者。
In the story, the zendik challenged the priests. 在故事裡，那位異端者挑戰了祭司。

meaning: 異端分子；持異端觀點的人
sentences: The zendikite refused to follow the crowd. 那名異端分子拒絕跟隨群眾。
A zendikite was mentioned in the old хроicle. 舊編年史裡提到一名異端分子。

meaning: 專名；舊式人名或地名
sentences: Zenelophon appeared in a list of old names. 澤尼洛豐出現在一份舊名字清單中。
The archive had one reference to Zenelophon. 檔案館裡有一條關於澤尼洛豐的記錄。

meaning: 與禪意或寧靜氣質有關的
sentences: The room had a quiet, zenick feel. 那個房間有一種安靜的禪意。
She chose a zenick style for the study. 她替書房選了帶有禪意的風格。

meaning: 最高點或狀態；頂峰。
sentences: Winning the continental championship was the zenith of my career. 贏得洲際冠軍是我職業生涯的巔峰。
The term zenith refers to highest point or state; peak. 術語“天頂”指的是最高點或狀態；頂峰。

meaning: 天頂的；位於正上方的
sentences: The zenithal light was strongest at noon. 正午時，天頂方向的光最強。
Astronomers measured the zenithal angle. 天文學家測量了天頂角。

meaning: 朝向天頂的；向上方的
sentences: The rocket angled zenithward after launch. 火箭發射後朝向天頂方向上升。
The telescope was pointed zenithward. 望遠鏡被朝著正上方對準。

meaning: 朝向天頂地；向上方地
sentences: The beam moved zenithwards through the dome. 那束光沿著穹頂向上移動。
The bird climbed zenithwards into the sky. 那隻鳥朝著正上方飛入天空。

meaning: 芝諾比亞；女子名
sentences: Zenobia signed the guest book at the hotel. 芝諾比亞在飯店的訪客簿上簽名。
The play gave Zenobia a proud and calm voice. 那齣戲把芝諾比亞寫成一位驕傲而沉著的人。

meaning: 以外來事物為中心的；仰外的
sentences: His criticism sounded strangely zenocentric. 他的評論聽起來有點仰外。
A zenocentric view ignores local customs. 仰外的觀點會忽視本地習俗。

meaning: 與天頂觀測或描繪有關的
sentences: The map used a zenographic projection. 那張地圖採用了與天頂觀測有關的投影方式。
A zenographic sketch marked the sky's center. 一幅天頂描繪圖標出了天空的中心。

meaning: 與天頂觀測圖或描繪有關的
sentences: The report included a zenographical diagram. 報告裡附上了一張與天頂描繪有關的圖表。
Her zenographical notes were easy to follow. 她的天頂描繪筆記很容易看懂。

meaning: 天頂測繪；天空中心的描繪
sentences: The class introduced zenography to the students. 課堂上向學生介紹了天頂測繪。
Zenography helped them mark the sky's center. 天頂測繪幫助他們標出天空的中心。

meaning: 芝諾的；屬於哲學家芝諾的
sentences: The essay explored a Zenonian paradox. 那篇文章探討了一個芝諾式悖論。
She admired the Zenonian logic of the argument. 她欣賞那個論證中芝諾式的邏輯。

meaning: 芝諾的；與芝諾學說有關的
sentences: The lecturer used a Zenonic example. 講者使用了一個芝諾式例子。
His Zenonic reasoning sounded highly abstract. 他的芝諾式推理聽起來非常抽象。

meaning: 澤努族人；族名
sentences: The article described a zenu community by the river. 那篇文章描述了河邊的一個澤努族社群。
A zenu elder spoke during the ceremony. 一位澤努族長者在儀式上致詞。

meaning: 澤歐類群；一組魚類分類名
sentences: The handbook listed Zeoidei among marine fishes. 手冊把澤歐類群列在海水魚之中。
A researcher compared Zeoidei with related forms. 研究者把澤歐類群和相關類群做了比較。

meaning: 沸石
sentences: The sample contained a bright white zeolite. 那個樣本含有一塊亮白色的沸石。
Zeolite is often used in filters. 沸石常被用在過濾器中。

meaning: 沸石的；含沸石的
sentences: The rock had a zeolitic texture. 那塊岩石具有沸石質地。
Geologists studied the zeolitic layer. 地質學家研究了那層含沸石的地層。

meaning: 沸石化；形成沸石的過程
sentences: The paper explained zeolitization in detail. 那篇論文詳細說明了沸石化過程。
Heat and water can drive zeolitization. 熱與水分都可能促成沸石化。

meaning: 使沸石化；轉變成沸石
sentences: Mineral-rich fluids can zeolitize the rock. 富含礦物的液體會使岩石沸石化。
The process can zeolitize volcanic ash. 這個過程能把火山灰轉變成沸石。

meaning: 天頂觀測儀；舊式測天儀
sentences: The explorer carried a zeoscope for navigation. 探險者帶著一架天頂觀測儀來導航。
A zeoscope helped measure the sky's height. 天頂觀測儀有助於測量天空高度。

meaning: 澤普；男子名暱稱
sentences: Zep waved from the doorway. 澤普站在門口揮手。
Everyone called him Zep instead of his full name. 大家都直接叫他澤普，而不是全名。

meaning: 澤法羅維石；一種礦物
sentences: The curator labeled the mineral as zepharovichite. 館員把那塊礦物標示為澤法羅維石。
A small sample of zepharovichite sat in the tray. 托盤裡放著一小塊澤法羅維石樣本。

meaning: 微風
sentences: A zephyr moved through the open window. 一陣微風吹進了開著的窗戶。
The garden felt cool in the zephyr. 花園在微風中顯得很涼爽。

meaning: 蔥蓮屬；一類球根花卉植物
sentences: Zephyranthes bloomed after the summer rain. 蔥蓮屬植物在夏雨後開花。
The gardener planted Zephyranthes near the path. 園丁把蔥蓮屬植物種在步道旁。

meaning: 微風般的；輕柔的
sentences: Her voice had a zephyrean softness. 她的聲音帶著微風般的柔和。
The music drifted away in a zephyrean way. 那首樂曲以輕柔的方式飄散開來。

meaning: 無風的；沒有微風的
sentences: The afternoon was zephyrless and hot. 那個午後無風而且炎熱。
We waited in a zephyrless room. 我們等在一個完全沒有微風的房間裡。

meaning: 像微風的；輕柔的
sentences: The curtains moved in a zephyrlike motion. 窗簾以像微風一樣的方式擺動。
